title: Financials
description: Schema for financial data extracted from a charity's annual financial report.

source.description: A unified, programmatic data structure for referencing the source of an extracted data point.

source_type.description: The strict category of the source document.

source_index.description: For attached PDF document sources, the 0-based index of the attached document (among all attached documents) where the data was found.

page_number.description: For attached PDF document sources, the 1-based absolute index of the page (in that attached document) where the data was found.

search_result_index.description: For web_search sources, the 0-based index of the search result snippet used.

quote.description: The exact verbatim wording quoted from the source, used for verification and text-fragment generation.

resolved_url.description: The fully resolved deep-link URL (e.g., with #page=N or #:~:text=...) to the specific source evidence. This is populated programmatically.

financial_figure.description: A container for a financial value and its specific source, where the source is nullable if nothing to be quoted.

financial_year.description: The financial year of the report, e.g., '2024-25'.

currency.description: Details about the original currency and its exchange rate to USD.

original_code.description: The 3-letter ISO 4217 code of the original currency from the report (e.g., HKD, INR, USD).

usd_exchange_rate.description: The exchange rate to convert 1 unit of the original currency to USD.

rate_date.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) for which the exchange rate is valid.

donations.description: Voluntary contributions, sponsorships, or public donations.

government_grants.description: Total SWD subvention, including LSG, Rent & Rates, and Central Items.

administration.description: Overhead, 'Central Administrative Costs', or 'Management/General Office' expenses.

fundraising.description: Costs related to appeals, flag days, or donation solicitations.

program_services.description: Costs directly attributed to welfare services.

program_breakdowns.description: Granular line-item spending on specific programmes.

total_reserves.description: Total unrestricted reserves or fund balance at year end.
